title: ViaSix local-proxy.json
description: Local proxy, routing, and network-access preferences. Platform UIs may hide unsupported fields (e.g. systemProxy on Android).

listenAddress.description: Mixed proxy bind address; must be a loopback address.

networkAccessMode.description: localProxy = user-space core only; virtualInterface = TUN/VpnService path when available.

systemProxyEnabled.description: Desktop system proxy. Android implementations should ignore or force false.
